< Flats and textures
  Flats and textures [view]
SRB2 levels Single Player: GFZ • THZ • DSZ • CEZ • ACZ • RVZ • DCZ • GEZ • ERZ
Other: NiGHTS • Mario • Special Stage • Multiplayer • SRB1 Remake
Other themes Caves/Cliffs • Xmas • Disco • Forts • GHZ • HPZ • Ice/Snow • Jungle • Sand • Forest
Miscellaneous Colors • Generic • Old • SA-SRB2 • Miscellaneous • Skies

The following is an exhibit of generic flats and textures which are commonly used for specific purposes in levels, and can be seen in a wide variety of themes.

Bustable FOFs

Flats Textures
BUSTFLR BUSTROCK

Hazard/Caution stripes

Flats Textures
CEIL3_1 YELCAUTN
DEM1_3 REDCAUTN

Spikes

Textures Textures
SPIKE1 SPIKE2
SPIKEU1 SPIKEU2
SPIKEUF SPIKEUF1
SPIKEUF2 SPIKEWAL

Pits

Flats Textures
PIT ~PIT

CTF banners

Textures Textures
CTFFLG01 CTFFLG04
CTFFLG02 CTFFLG05
CTFFLG03 CTFFLG06

Arrow signs

Textures Textures
ARROWD ARROWL
ARROWR ARROWU
BIGX

Character signs

Textures Textures
HAZARDK HAZARDS
HAZARDT

Egg Capsules

Flats Textures
TRAPFLR EGGTRAP1
EGGTRAP2

Glass

Flats Textures
GLASS3 GLASS
GLASS2
GLASS3
GLASSTEX

Dirt

Flats Textures
DIRT DIRT2
DIRT1F DIRT3
DIRT2F DIRT4
DIRT3F DIRTW
DIRT4F
